rawAssistant: Traveler, I sense a mix of caution and anticipation in your demeanor, fitting for one who's seen the misty dawns of Hollowfen. Your charm hoop bears the mark of our town's folk, and I see the weight of your road kit, reminding you that safety can be just a thread away. As we stand here, the morning light brings new questions to the surface. What draws your attention to this side road?
